ddls:
CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the school */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the school */,
  "principal_email" TEXT /* Email address of the school principal */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the school */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the district the school belongs to */,
  "school_type" TEXT /* Type of school (e.g., elementary, middle, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "surveys" (
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school that created the survey */,
  "survey_name" TEXT /* Name of the survey */,
  "survey_type" TEXT /* Type of survey (e.g., parent, student, teacher) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the survey */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the survey */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the survey */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the survey (e.g., draft, active, closed) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the survey purpose */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_surveys_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "questions" (
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each question */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey the question belongs to */,
  "question_text" TEXT /* Text of the question */,
  "question_type" TEXT /* Type of question (e.g., Likert scale, multiple-choice, open-ended) */,
  "options" TEXT /* Possible options for multiple-choice questions */,
  "required" INTEGER /* Indicates if the question is mandatory */,
  "question_order" INTEGER /* Order of the question in the survey */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_questions_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question the response belongs to */,
  "respondent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the respondent who provided the response */,
  "response_text" TEXT /* Text of the response */,
  "response_date" TEXT /* Date the response was submitted */,
  "response_type" TEXT /* Type of response (e.g., text, numeric) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_respondent_id FOREIGN KEY ("respondent_id") REFERENCES respondents ("respondent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "likert_scale_responses" (
  "likert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Likert scale response */,
  "response_id" INTEGER /* ID of the response the Likert scale response belongs to */,
  "strongly_agree" INTEGER /* Number of strongly agree responses */,
  "agree" INTEGER /* Number of agree responses */,
  "disagree" INTEGER /* Number of disagree responses */,
  "strongly_disagree" INTEGER /* Number of strongly disagree responses */,
  "dont_know" INTEGER /* Number of don't know responses */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("likert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_likert_scale_responses_response_id FOREIGN KEY ("response_id") REFERENCES responses ("response_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "respondents" (
  "respondent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each respondent */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school the respondent belongs to */,
  "respondent_name" TEXT /* Name of the respondent */,
  "respondent_email" TEXT /* Email address of the respondent */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the respondent (e.g., parent, student, teacher) */,
  "demographics" TEXT /* Demographic information (e.g., age, gender) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("respondent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "response_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "respondent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the respondent who submitted the response */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey the response belongs to */,
  "response_date" TEXT /* Date the response was submitted */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the response was submitted */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the device used to submit the response */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_response_logs_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_response_logs_respondent_id FOREIGN KEY ("respondent_id") REFERENCES respondents ("respondent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey the analytics belongs to */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question the analytics belongs to */,
  "average_score" REAL /* Average score for the question */,
  "total_responses" INTEGER /* Total number of responses for the question */,
  "median_score" REAL /* Median score for the question */,
  "std_deviation" REAL /* Standard deviation of the scores */,
  "response_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of responses across different options */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)
